error_signature: unable to calculate number of nights from dates
title: Calculating number of nights for booking email
symptom: The user is unable to include the number of nights in the email sent from the booking form data.
applies_when: Using a web form with check-in and check-out dates
Sending an email with booking details
not_this_if: The email is sent without date calculations
The workflow does not involve date fields
root_cause: The user needs to calculate the difference between two date fields (check-in and check-out) to determine the number of nights for the booking. This requires proper date manipulation in the workflow.
fix_steps: Use a Code node to calculate the difference between the check-in and check-out dates.

Implement the following code: {{ Math.round((new Date($(‘Direct Booking Enquiry’).item.json[‘Check Out Date’]) - new Date($(‘Direct Booking Enquiry’).item.json[‘Check In Date’])) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) }}
Pass the calculated number of nights to the email trigger node.
agent_instruction: Add a Code node to calculate the number of nights and pass it to the email node.
